hero.title: Grave care across any distance
hero.subtitle: Stay connected to what matters — we care for your loved ones’ resting place with dignity and consistency
howitworks.title: Simple Care. Lasting Peace of Mind.
howitworks.subtitle: See how Oaza Mira makes it easy to ensure your loved ones' graves are cared for – no matter where you are in the world.
howitworks.steps.title: How It Works
howitworks.steps.subtitle: Getting started is simple. Follow a few clear steps to ensure ongoing, reliable care.
howitworks.step1.title: Get Started
howitworks.step2.title: Register & Choose
howitworks.step2.desc: Register your grave and select a care plan.
howitworks.step3.title: Care Delivery
howitworks.step3.desc: A trusted local caretaker takes over.
howitworks.step4.title: Stay Updated
howitworks.step4.desc: Receive before-and-after photos after each visit.
howitworks.features.title: What Makes Oaza Mira Special
howitworks.features.subtitle: We've built a platform that prioritizes trust, transparency, and compassion.
howitworks.feature1.title: Verified Caretakers
howitworks.feature1.desc: Every caretaker in our network is verified, ensuring trust and reliability.
howitworks.feature2.title: Fresh Floral Arrangements
howitworks.feature2.desc: Seasonal flowers and decorations to keep the resting place beautiful year-round.
howitworks.feature3.title: Photo Documentation
howitworks.feature3.desc: Visual proof after every visit – transparency you can trust.
howitworks.feature4.title: Real-Time Notifications
howitworks.feature4.desc: Get instant updates when care is completed or if any action is needed.
howitworks.feature5.title: Family Collaboration
howitworks.feature5.desc: Invite family members to view and contribute to the care together.
howitworks.feature6.title: Compassionate Support
howitworks.feature6.desc: Our team is here to help whenever you need assistance.
howitworks.testimonials.title: Families Trust Oaza Mira
howitworks.testimonials.subtitle: See what families around Europe have to say about their experience.
howitworks.testimonial1: Living in Vienna while my mother's grave is in Croatia used to worry me constantly. Now I receive photos every month and have peace of mind.
howitworks.testimonial2: The photo proof feature is incredible. I finally know that my father's grave is being well-maintained, even from 800km away.
howitworks.testimonial3: We use Oaza Mira as a family. My siblings in Canada and I share the cost and the care. It's brought us closer together.
howitworks.cta.title: Ready to Begin?
howitworks.cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of families who trust Oaza Mira to care for their loved ones.
plans.title: Reliable Care-Plans via our Members Portal.
plans.subtitle: Our verified network of caretakers ensures monthly upkeep, floral arrangements, and photo proof for complete transparency.
plans.basic.title: Basic Care-Plan
plans.premium.title: Premium Care-Plan
plans.premium.desc: Weekly care, new flowers & dedicated local caretaker.
app.title: Download the App. Register for free.
app.subtitle: Join the Oaza Mira portal entirely for free. Once you verify your account, you will unlock access to browse, request, and manage ongoing Care-Plans from our verified caretakers worldwide.
cta.final: Join hundreds of families who trust Oaza Mira for grave care.

privacy-policy.eniysn: We process personal data only to the extent necessary to provide our services or respond to inquiries, including:
privacy-policy.2h4v5g: We use carefully selected providers for hosting, email delivery, analytics and marketing. They process data only on our behalf and under our instructions. Data transfers to other countries occur only if adequate protection exists or appropriate safeguards are in place. Transfers to US providers (e.g., Google LLC, Meta Platforms Inc., SendGrid, Mailchimp) occur only if certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework or based on EU Standard Contractual Clauses.
privacy-policy.n7kh4j: Our website uses only technically necessary cookies. If analytics or marketing cookies are used, we will ask for your consent first. You can withdraw your consent at any time via cookie settings.
privacy-policy.ls2tnc: Personal data is kept only as long as necessary for the respective purpose or as required by law.
privacy-policy.ow8rze: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, data portability, object to processing and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, send an e-mail to contact@oaza-mira.app. You may also contact the competent data protection authority in Florida, United States, or your country of residence.
privacy-policy.ytl33c: We protect personal data through technical and organizational measures against loss, misuse and unauthorized access (e.g. SSL encryption, access restrictions, regular backups).
privacy-policy.txt85s: This policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always available on this website.‍Last updated: 30 October 2025
privacy-policy.1vttbc: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

families.hero.desc: Care for your loved ones’ resting place from anywhere. Every visit is handled with respect and confirmed with clear photo proof.
families.how.title: How it works
families.how.1.title: Register your grave
families.how.1.desc: Add your loved one's grave to the Oaza Mira system.
families.how.2.title: Choose services
families.how.2.desc: Select cleaning, decoration, candles or custom care.
families.how.3.title: Confirm order
families.how.3.desc: Review and confirm your service request.
families.how.4.title: Receive photo proof
families.how.4.desc: Get photos once your order is completed.
families.invite.title: Invite your family – care together.
families.invite.desc: Invite your family to join Oaza Mira – so you can share memories, stay connected and care together. Everyone can contribute their part, making remembrance a shared act of love.
families.know.title: Already Have a Caretaker?
families.know.desc: Share Oaza Mira with them and simplify coordination — clear communication, verified work, all in one place.
families.app.title: See how it looks – a first glimpse into the app.
families.app.desc: Order, track and view care results – simple, secure and documented.
business.hero.desc: Support employees, customers, and communities with thoughtful, reliable care — handled with clarity and respect.
business.pillar1.title: Support your team in what truly matters.
business.pillar1.desc: Offer your employees a simple way to care for their loved ones. With Oaza Mira, remembrance becomes part of corporate wellbeing – strengthening loyalty, compassion and community within your company.
business.pillar2.title: Corporate responsibility with real impact.
business.pillar2.desc: Partner with Oaza Mira to support local cemeteries, community remembrance projects or social programs. Together we create lasting value – dignity, care and peace that reflect your company's values.
business.cta.title: We're here to help
business.cta.desc: Let's talk about corporate cooperation. We build tailored solutions for employee benefits and corporate social responsibility programs.
institutions.hero.desc: Oaza Mira supports institutions, companies, municipalities, associations and governments in maintaining graves, monuments and memorials transparently and respectfully. We enable digital planning, documentation and cooperation – wherever people and remembrance matter.
institutions.pillar1.title: Partnerships that build profound trust.
institutions.pillar1.desc: We create long-term cooperations with organisations that value transparency and accountability in public spaces of remembrance. Oaza Mira offers centralised management tools and photo documentation for every maintained site.
institutions.pillar2.title: Digital Planning & Documentation.
institutions.pillar2.desc: Replace manual coordination with our dedicated institutional portal. From tracking maintenance cycles to handling large-scale monument restorations, we ensure every act of care is verifiably completed.
institutions.cta.title: Start a cooperation today – join the Oaza Mira network.
institutions.cta.desc: Discover how our municipal, corporate and governmental partners are modernising grave care and memorial maintenance across the globe.
institutions.steps.title: How it Works for Institutions
institutions.step1.title: Consultation
institutions.step1.desc: We analyze your municipal or institutional needs to define the scope of memorial maintenance or monument restoration.
institutions.step2.title: Integration
institutions.step2.desc: Connect existing partners or access our verified local caretaker network through our dedicated management portal.
institutions.step3.title: Management
institutions.step3.desc: Track progress digitally with photo-proof, automated reporting, and centralized documentation for every site.
providers.hero.desc: Join the Oaza Mira network and receive clear, reliable service requests. Build your reputation through verified work and consistent quality.
providers.steps.title: Boost your business in 3 steps.
providers.step1.title: Create your profile
providers.step1.desc: Set up your services, packages, and service areas to be found by families.
providers.step2.title: Connect clients
providers.step2.desc: Invite existing clients and let them book your services directly through Oaza Mira.
providers.step3.title: Plan & prosper
providers.step3.desc: Manage all orders efficiently in one dashboard and secure recurring income.
providers.cta.title: Expand your reach – connect with families.
providers.cta.desc: Join the Oaza Mira network and receive orders from families and institutions seeking quality care services.

teaser.title: Close, No Matter the Distance
teaser.desc: Stay connected to your loved ones’ resting place. With the Oaza Mira app, you can arrange care, follow each visit, and review before-and-after photos — all with clarity and ease.
teaser.feature1.title: Effortless Booking
teaser.feature1.desc: Arrange care in just a few steps — simple and seamless.
teaser.feature2.title: Verified Care Updates.
teaser.feature2.desc: Receive clear before-and-after photos after every visit.
teaser.feature3.title: Secure & Transparent Payments
teaser.feature3.desc: Manage services and subscriptions with complete confidence.
